subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou beholdest this radiant servant of Thine, this lowly thrall in Thy presence, who hath borne all hardships in Thy path [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله ابهی الهی تری عبدک الابهر و رقک الاصغر قد تحمل کل مشاق فی سبیلک و کل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @wisdom [hikmat]
